mapper.sql: rs_image.id, rs_image.image_code, rs_image.image_name, rs_image.sensor_type, rs_image.satellite_name, rs_image.acquisition_time, rs_image.cloud_percent, rs_image.resolution_meter, rs_image.band_count, rs_image.projection, rs_image.width, rs_image.height, rs_image.file_format, rs_image.file_size, rs_image.content_type, rs_image.metadata_json::text AS metadata_json, rs_image.minio_bucket, rs_image.object_key, rs_image.thumbnail_object_key, rs_image.overview_object_key, ST_AsText(rs_image.footprint) AS footprint_wkt, rs_image.center_lon, rs_image.center_lat, rs_image.status, rs_image.description, rs_image.deleted_at, rs_image.deleted_by, rs_image.deleted_reason, rs_image.created_at, rs_image.updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rs_image ( image_code, image_name, sensor_type, satellite_name, acquisition_time, cloud_percent, resolution_meter, band_count, projection, width, height, file_format, file_size, content_type, metadata_json, minio_bucket, object_key, thumbnail_object_key, overview_object_key, footprint, center_lon, center_lat, status, description ) VALUES ( #{imageCode}, #{imageName}, #{sensorType}, #{satelliteName}, #{acquisitionTime}, #{cloudPercent}, #{resolutionMeter}, #{bandCount}, #{projection}, #{width}, #{height}, #{fileFormat}, #{fileSize}, #{contentType}, CAST(NULLIF(#{metadataJson}, '') AS jsonb), #{minioBucket}, #{objectKey}, #{thumbnailObjectKey}, #{overviewObjectKey}, ST_GeomFromText(NULLIF(#{footprintWkt}, ''), 4326), #{centerLon}, #{centerLat}, COALESCE(#{status}, 'READY'), #{description} )
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM rs_image WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT
FROM rs_image WHERE deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM rs_image WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE rs_image SET status = 'DELETED', deleted_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, deleted_by = #{deletedBy}, deleted_reason = #{deletedReason}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND status IN ('READY', 'FAILED')
UPDATE rs_image SET status = 'PROCESSING', updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'READY' AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE rs_image SET status = 'READY', updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'PROCESSING' AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE rs_image SET thumbnail_object_key = #{thumbnailObjectKey}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
